meta.title: Cartoonova - Turn Your Photos into Cartoon Caricatures
meta.description: Order your personalized cartoon-style caricature. Professional artists, satisfaction guaranteed.
meta.ogDescription: Order your personalized caricature from your photo. A unique and original gift!

collections.heroSubtitle: Transform your photos into personalized works of art

hero.subtitle: Receive a unique hand-drawn caricature. The perfect personalized gift!

howItWorks.title: How does it work? 🤔
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload a photo of yourself, your family, friends or pets.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our professional artists create your unique cartoon caricature.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get your digital file and/or premium print delivered.

gallery.title: Our creations 🖼️
gallery.subtitle: Each portrait is hand-drawn with passion!

reviews.title: They love their caricature! ⭐
reviews.subtitle: Thousands of satisfied customers around the world.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions 🤓
faq.q1: How long does it take to create the caricature?
faq.a1: Our artists typically complete your caricature in 3 to 5 business days depending on complexity.
faq.q2: Do people need to be in the same photo?
faq.a2: Not at all! Send us individual photos and our artists will draw everyone together in one image.
faq.q3: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
faq.a3: We offer unlimited free revisions until you are completely satisfied!
faq.q4: Can my pet also become a cartoon?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Dogs, cats, birds — we can transform any beloved pet into a cartoon character.
faq.q5: Can I also have objects or settings drawn?
faq.a5: Yes! We can include objects, vehicles, settings or accessories for a small extra fee.

product.videoSubtitle: Watch the magic happen — from photo to cartoon!
product.review1Text: Absolutely gorgeous! The drawing is accurate and the print quality is top-notch. A perfect gift!
product.review2Text: Super fast delivery and the quality is simply amazing. My wife was thrilled!
product.review3Text: The perfect gift for my parents' anniversary. The resemblance is incredible, they loved it!
product.review4Text: Remarkable work! The drawing really looks like us. Absolutely recommended.
product.review5Text: Top-notch customer service and stunning result. It won't be the last time I order here!
product.review6Text: We were very pleasantly surprised. Great image and excellent support. We will recommend without hesitation.
product.faqQ1: How long does it take to Order the caricature?
product.faqA1: Our artists typically complete your caricature in 3 to 5 business days depending on complexity.
product.faqQ2: Do all people need to be in the same photo?
product.faqA2: Not at all! Send us individual photos and our artists will draw everyone together in one image.
product.faqQ3: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
product.faqA3: We offer unlimited free revisions until your complete satisfaction. Your happiness is our priority!
product.faqQ4: Can my pet also become a yellow cartoon?
product.faqA4: Absolutely! Dogs, cats, birds — we can transform any beloved pet into a yellow cartoon character.
product.faqQ5: Can I also have objects drawn?
product.faqA5: Yes! We can include objects, vehicles, settings or accessories in your caricature for a small extra fee.

onepiece.heroSubtitle: Become a legendary pirate with your own personalized One Piece style bounty!
onepiece.customizeSubtitle: Choose your options step by step. The total updates in real time.
onepiece.fullbodyDesc: Complete Wanted poster — head to toe
onepiece.uploadTitle: Drag and drop your photos here
onepiece.uploadSubtitle: or click to browse — JPG, PNG up to 10 MB
onepiece.videoSubtitle: Watch the magic happen — from photo to poster!
onepiece.review1Text: My bounty finally matches my ambitions! The Pirate King approves!
onepiece.review2Text: Three swords, one legendary poster. Perfect for decorating the Sunny!
onepiece.review3Text: 66 million berries? I should have asked for more! But the poster is gorgeous!
onepiece.review4Text: Finally a poster where I look handsome! Thank you Cartoonova!
onepiece.review5Text: The history of my bounty, now on my wall. Moving and superb quality.
onepiece.review6Text: 100 berries? That's an insult! But the poster is so cute!
onepiece.faqQ1: How long to receive my Wanted poster?
onepiece.faqA1: Our artists create your poster in 3 to 5 business days. The perfect bounty takes time!
onepiece.faqQ2: Can I put multiple pirates on one poster?
onepiece.faqA2: Absolutely! Create your dream crew on a single Wanted poster.
onepiece.faqQ3: Can I customize my bounty amount?
onepiece.faqA3: Yes! Tell us the amount you want and we'll add it to your poster.
onepiece.faqQ4: Can my pet have its own bounty?
onepiece.faqA4: Of course! Dogs, cats, parrots — all can become wanted pirates!
onepiece.faqA5: Yes! Hats, swords, devil fruits — customize your pirate style!

dbz.review1Text: My portrait is incredible! The Super Saiyan aura is perfect, I look ready to fight Frieza!
dbz.review2Text: Finally a portrait worthy of the Prince of Saiyans! Royal quality!
dbz.review3Text: My Super Saiyan 2 transformation is beautiful! Perfect for decorating my room!
dbz.review4Text: The style is true to the anime! I recommend it to all DBZ fans!
dbz.review5Text: Even without being a Saiyan, my portrait is epic! Thanks Cartoonova!
dbz.review6Text: For once, I look as cool as Goku in a portrait! Awesome!
dbz.faqQ1: How long to receive my DBZ portrait?
dbz.faqA1: Our artists create your portrait in 3 to 5 business days. A legendary transformation takes time!
dbz.faqQ2: Can I put multiple warriors on one portrait?
dbz.faqA2: Absolutely! Create your ultimate battle team on a single portrait.
dbz.faqQ3: Can I choose my Super Saiyan transformation?
dbz.faqA3: Yes! SSJ, SSJ2, SSJ3, SSJ Blue — tell us your favorite transformation!
dbz.faqQ4: Can my pet have a DBZ portrait?
dbz.faqA4: Of course! Dogs, cats — all can become legendary warriors!
dbz.faqA5: Yes! Energy aura, Kamehameha, Final Flash — customize your battle style!
